title: ouratea nervosa
intro: Ouratea nervosa, also known as the Nervous Water Lily or Yerba de Pasmo, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ouratea nervosa include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of depression. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and is often combined with other herbs in herbal preparations to enhance its medicinal properties.
